# Apache Tomcat 11.0.18 Patch Layer

Use this directory to track diffs against the pristine source tree imported
under `vendor/upstream/apache-tomcat/11.0.18`.

## Rules

- Keep upstream sources untouched in `vendor/upstream`.
- Store patch files, change logs, or design notes here.
- Reference affected upstream files and the reason for divergence.
- Prefer adapter changes under `vendor/adapters` before patching upstream code.
